Finding: Past-start guard rejects duration-only edits of an in-progress booking, stricter than the server
Fix: Mirror server: only reject past start if start time is moved into the past.

Finding: No-shows and unprocessed past bookings stay under Upcoming with live Call to cancel because markBookingNoShow never changes status
Fix: Split bookings filter by time and noShow; show Call to cancel only on genuinely future confirmed bookings.

Finding: Delete-account failure sets an error banner behind the still-open modal, so the user sees nothing
Fix: Render delete failure inside the modal while it remains open.

Finding: logout/deleteAccount do not clear notifications, loyaltyTransactions, or auditLogs, so next account can see prior account data
Fix: Clear notifications, loyaltyTransactions, and auditLogs in both logout and deleteAccount resets.

Finding: Shared-device push token: B's onConflict token upsert hits A's row, RLS blocks it, so pushes keep routing to A
Fix: Add SECURITY DEFINER token reassignment RPC and deactivate token on signout.

Finding: CSV formula injection: csvEscape does not neutralize = + - @ leading chars; user names/reasons flow into admin exports
Fix: Prefix formula-leading cells with apostrophe before CSV escaping.

Finding: If second reminder write fails after reschedule reorder, refresh restores old notification id and new reminder can be orphaned/fires
Fix: Make reminder update transactional/best-effort with cleanup or persist new id reliably after scheduling.

Finding: mark_schema_migration is SECURITY DEFINER but executable by any authenticated user, allowing forged Admin Health migration status
Fix: REVOKE EXECUTE on public.mark_schema_migration from public, anon, authenticated.

Finding: MAX_DURATION_HOURS=3 and rule says up to 3h, but ALLOWED_DURATIONS tops at 2h, so advertised 3h booking is unreachable
Fix: Either add 3h to ALLOWED_DURATIONS or change copy/rules to say 2h max selectable.

Finding: Placeholder-user fallback in bookings filter can show a stray row when logged out
Fix: Remove placeholder-user fallback; require current user id for filtering.

Finding: Tapping an already-read notification rewrites it and resets readAt
Fix: Guard markRead so it only updates unread notifications.

Finding: router.back() with no canGoBack fallback dead-ends on deep-link entry
Free-reward label disagrees between receipt and card: receipt checks isFree && total===0, card checks isFree
Fix: Use one shared condition/copy for reward bookings.

Finding: Notification UPDATE policy has no column restriction, so user can rewrite own notification title/message
Fix: Restrict user updates to read_at only, likely via trigger or RPC.

Finding: Client counts completed regardless of time while server uses end_time < now()
Fix: Align client completion counting with server end_time < now() rule.

Finding: sendExpoPush does not chunk payloads for Expo 100-message cap
Fix: Chunk Expo push messages in batches of 100.
